body:
Courageous Conservatives - Reigniting the Promise of America
**Hello Friend,**
Wow -- what a week! I'm writing you from in between stops on the #CruzCountry Bus Tour as we continue our #CruzToVictory through southern states that will play a huge part in making Ted our Republican nominee for President of the United States.
As you likely know, the Republican candidates met in Cleveland, Ohio, for the first debate of the 2016 season on Thursday. And it was a great night for Ted -- [but don't just take it from me](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6Snjxf-2BN1jeUOuTu5iTPDxGgsX_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCEgs3nnwPq-2B5823rY1MRbU6XO-2Bnd3q0eorp8Z32u6-2BPYKYWx1RqUL4KhM5v1kZqbG1gT408Lc7dHyiaNd6fGAiBAen70BJYK3eqqgutb5xeHxluMz2T6UCecElNVLP642rJKBMA4VkoJTbkzUaN3sb5WkrNhCUz2ZTWoB9-2BsiJmg5jq1Sdurtnm0Hx1awsmfk665BGyZK22OgLRR9tntyPA6xynf-2FKmGstgQrDhVn5j642LxyhJBEsapzxmIBu0lUFa39uUX6ElJnu6GcdN1YU-2F4HBEjTOFjT0-2F4zXGAgoUavUvHfByKzXPyxTriQQeZA-2FrxjN-2BhM-2BLltXgF3mI-2Bl26TBk0f865l147A5dwBEAfTijtkLsm3xFLcYo4Z6UQcuM-3D):
Frank Luntz declared the debate "great news for Ted Cruz."
Charles Krauthammer named Ted Cruz a "winner of the night."
_The Press Enterprise_ wrote "Cruz drew hearty applause when he called for border security and when he accused GOP leaders of not honoring their commitment to conservative principles."
_Conservative Review_ argued that "while most of the candidates seem to have solid moments and heartfelt convictions on an issue here or there, one man always stands out as having the full passion, depth of knowledge, resoluteness, fighting spirit, and inviolable record on almost every issue of our time. That man is Senator Ted Cruz."
And the Washington Post observed "the most Googled candidate in the debate at any point was Ted Cruz -- with 67 percent more searches at his peak than the next most-searched candidate's peak."
And applause breaks throughout the debate really put it into perspective:

clean_body: Courageous Conservatives - Reigniting the Promise of America Hello Friend, Wow -- what a week! I'm writing you from in between stops on the #CruzCountry Bus Tour as we continue our #CruzToVictory through southern states that will play a huge part in making Ted our Republican nominee for President of the United States. As you likely know, the Republican candidates met in Cleveland, Ohio, for the first debate of the 2016 season on Thursday. And it was a great night for Ted -- : Frank Luntz declared the debate "great news for Ted Cruz." Charles Krauthammer named Ted Cruz a "winner of the night." The Press Enterprise wrote "Cruz drew hearty applause when he called for border security and when he accused GOP leaders of not honoring their commitment to conservative principles." Conservative Review argued that "while most of the candidates seem to have solid moments and heartfelt convictions on an issue here or there, one man always stands out as having the full passion, depth of knowledge, resoluteness, fighting spirit, and inviolable record on almost every issue of our time. That man is Senator Ted Cruz." And the Washington Post observed "the most Googled candidate in the debate at any point was Ted Cruz -- with 67 percent more searches at his peak than the next most-searched candidate's peak." And applause breaks throughout the debate really put it into perspective: In the buildup for our #CruzCountry Bus Tour, we've also announced robust state leadership teams in , , and \-- and there are more on the way! If you're along the #CruzCountry tour route -- we've had stops in South Carolina and Georgia, and we're visiting Alabama, Mississippi, Tennessee, Arkansas, and Oklahoma -- . If not, you can follow along with the tour on , , , and on Snapchat (cruz4president)! I hope to see you soon, and keep up the fight for liberty! But I'm not interested in gaining their favor.

I'm interested in unleashing the American Dream by restoring our God-given liberties and freedoms.
